name: uhid
description: UniHealth ID - Unified Health Identity Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "API,WEB,AI" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/ai"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/api && npm run lint --workspace=apps/web
